notes: Legacy beta distribution follows the modern default-bounds lane.
Legacy beta inverse follows the modern default-bounds lane.
Legacy binomial alias follows the modern kernel.
Legacy CHIDIST matches the right-tail chi-square lane.
Legacy CHIINV matches the right-tail chi-square inverse lane.
Legacy CONFIDENCE follows the normal-confidence kernel.
Legacy exponential alias follows the modern kernel.
Legacy FDIST matches the right-tail F lane.
Legacy FINV matches the right-tail inverse lane.
Legacy gamma distribution follows the modern kernel.

Confidence alpha must lie strictly inside the unit interval.
